scores.notes: Code is well-structured and idiomatic ops charm. Uses event.workload correctly, add_layer with combine=True, replan(), self.config, relation data access, and HTTP health check with url field. Minor issues: DatabaseRequires and fetch_relation_data() from data-platform-libs may not exist exactly as used (potential hallucination of that specific library API); the gold standard uses direct relation.data[relation.app] access which is standard ops. The charms.data_platform_libs import adds an external dependency not required by the question. Otherwise complete with all three requested features (config command, db env vars, HTTP health check).
